title: Robin Is Dragged Away
description: Back in Enies Lobby, the Straw Hats fully reject the World Government’s authority and stand with Robin.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this part follows Spandam, Nico Robin, Zoro, Nami, Sanji. Back in Enies Lobby, the Straw Hats fully reject the World Government’s authority and stand with Robin.

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: declared war... against the world govern-ment--!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'd be happy to live with that!!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I haven't heard it from you yet!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Is your greatest sin, Nico Robin!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: woodooh, I love you guys, damn it--!!!

summary: Back in Enies Lobby, the Straw Hats fully reject the World Government’s authority and stand with Robin.
